description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender, and ornately detailed black metal column with a robust, flared base for stability. The post is topped with a classic lantern-style lamp head, which is hexagonal and tapers upward, capped by a decorative finial. The lamp head is encased in glass panels, framed by metal, and includes subtle ornamental ridges and trim. The central shaft of the post is segmented with decorative rings and fluting, adding to its vintage, Victorian-inspired aesthetic. The entire structure is monochromatic, with a matte black finish that enhances its historic and elegant appearance. This lamppost is designed to be both functional and visually appealing in urban streetscapes, parks, or historic neighborhoods.
description: A tall, ornate black lamppost with a hexagonal lantern head and decorative Victorian-style details, finished in matte black.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hexagonal lantern head, decorative finial, and detailed column with flared base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical lantern head and the ornamental rings along the shaft.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the lantern head and column details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of the other side, with clear view of the base and lamp head.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Hexagonal lantern with glass panels, Victorian-style finial, and ornamental trim
